messages.content: hey! sorry i kinda disappeared for a few days, life got busy lol

Welcome back. Life has a way of doing that.

What's been on your mind?
yeah i was out with some friends this weekend, met a few new people too, was a good time

That sounds like a good stretch — new faces and some time out of your usual routine.

What's staying with you from it?
theres this one person i hit it off with, we've been texting nonstop honestly. kinda excited about it

That early spark when conversation just flows — it's a good feeling.

What is it about them that's caught your attention?
anyway i'll probably be around less now that im seeing them more. just wanted to let you know whats up

That makes a lot of sense — go be present with them. It sounds like something worth investing in.

Take care of yourself.
